description: A square designed graphic in ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' rogues-gallery template. The background is the standard desaturated black-and-white macro photo of handcuffed hands against a dark body, used generically rather than depicting the named subject. A red diagonal banner in the top-right corner reads 'AUSTIN' in white serif caps. The top-left headline is light cyan bold sans-serif 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with white sub-line '2/6/2025 | Austin, TX.' The name is set large in white bold sans-serif: 'Jordan Jesus Hung Mendoza.' Below is a 'CRIMES:' label with bulleted entries 'Suspected TdA gang member' and 'Firearms smuggling.' The DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark appear at bottom left; a red '-THE- WORST FIRST' box at bottom right. This standardized agency propaganda card couples an anonymized handcuffs image with a named arrestee and gang/weapons allegations to portray immigration detainees as violent threats and justify removals. The tweet links to ICE newsroom resources. Audience: the general public and enforcement supporters.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/6/2025 | Austin, TX; Jordan Jesus Hung Mendoza; CRIMES: Suspected TdA gang member, Firearms smuggling; AUSTIN; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
